official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound test_instance_block_status simple status and absent size fixture
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns test_instance_block_status to packet id 0x7e.
The scoped fixture body is one simple Component.literal status followed by false optional Vec3i marker.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, status fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer rich Component handling, present Vec3i size bytes, game-test block semantics, or UI behavior.
